message:
type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding opt-in debug trace logging to StreamListener (debug flag, guarded DEBUG logs at start/end/emit/flush/reset)

type: CLAIM
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding idle_timeout_s/tick() heartbeat timeout to StreamListener; will touch __init__, receive(), and add new tick() method plus a reset helper

type: INTENT
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Adding debug/debug_logger params to __init__ (appended after allow_reuse) and guarded DEBUG logs in receive()/flush()/reset branch; will keep edits additive/non-overlapping with your idle_timeout_s work, will re-check with coop-recv before finalizing

type: INTENT
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Will add idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking in receive(), new tick() method, and refactor the allow_reuse reset block (lines ~86-95) into a shared _reset_state() helper used by both receive() and tick() — safe hook point for your reset-event debug log

type: ANSWER
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Already added the debug log call inside the reset block in receive() (right after stream_start=False, before the else branch): 'if self.debug and self._logger.isEnabledFor(logging.DEBUG): self._logger.debug(f"State reset for field '{self.signature_field_name}' (allow_reuse=True)")' -- when you refactor into _reset_state(), please move this log line into that helper so it still fires on both receive() and tick() reset paths

type: STATUS
files: dspy/streaming/streaming_listener.py
summary: Done: added idle_timeout_s param, _last_chunk_ts tracking, _reset_state() helper (replaces inline reset in receive()'s allow_reuse branch), and tick() method. All keyword-only params/call sites in repo use kwargs so param ordering is safe. Tests pass. Not touching debug/logging.
